title: Fix WASM Video Renderer Initialization & Enable Offline Rendering
problem_description: Get the Rust WASM video renderer loading correctly and rendering in the home page editor. Messaging was already added but the renderer fails to initialize with an init error visible in the console. Need to get offline renderer working which was a primary use case for building the renderer.
